entity.summary: Hong Kong centralized virtual-asset exchange operated by Hash Blockchain Limited, approved to serve retail users under upgraded Type 1 and Type 7 licences in August 2023 and officially launched for retail trading on August 28, 2023.
entity.notes: The canonical launch date is refined from a year-level 2023 marker to the official retail launch on August 28, 2023. The record distinguishes the August 3 licence upgrade from the later public launch and does not treat every HashKey Group product as part of this exchange entity.

expected.summary: Hong Kong-based centralized exchange launched in 2023 and still operating under the HashKey Exchange brand.

changes.summary: Hong Kong centralized virtual-asset exchange operated by Hash Blockchain Limited, approved to serve retail users under upgraded Type 1 and Type 7 licences in August 2023 and officially launched for retail trading on August 28, 2023.
changes.notes: The canonical launch date is refined from a year-level 2023 marker to the official retail launch on August 28, 2023. The record distinguishes the August 3 licence upgrade from the later public launch and does not treat every HashKey Group product as part of this exchange entity.

events.title: HashKey Exchange received licence upgrades for retail services
events.description: HashKey Exchange announced that the Hong Kong SFC had upgraded its Type 1 and Type 7 licences, allowing the platform to expand from professional investors to retail users.
events.notes: This event records the retail-scope licence upgrade, separate from the later August 28 public launch.

events.title: HashKey Exchange officially launched retail trading
events.description: HashKey Exchange officially launched its licensed Hong Kong retail trading service on August 28, 2023 with bank transfers and initial USD trading pairs.

evidence.title: HashKey Exchange announces official uplift of Type 1 and Type 7 licences
evidence.notes: The official announcement records the August 3, 2023 licence upgrade and expansion to retail users.

evidence.title: SFC virtual asset trading platform operators
evidence.publisher: Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong
evidence.notes: The regulator's platform-operator materials provide the official licensing framework and current verification context for licensed Hong Kong VATPs.

evidence.title: HashKey Exchange goes live in Hong Kong
evidence.notes: The official announcement records the retail exchange's launch on August 28, 2023.

evidence.title: HashKey Exchange official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current licensed exchange operation.
